title: christella ovata
intro: Christella ovata, also known as the Asian tusk fern or forked polypody, is a species of fern native to Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Christella ovata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Christella ovata can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is often used in traditional herbal remedies in combination with other plants.
